description_long: This object is a cylindrical white candle with a visible flame at the top, suggesting it is currently lit. The candle is mounted on a round, flat wooden base that serves as a holder, providing stability and a rustic aesthetic. The wax surface of the candle appears smooth and unblemished, with no visible wax drips or signs of melting. The flame is small and realistic, with a gradient of yellow and blue hues, and a thin wick is visible at the center of the flame. The wooden base is circular, slightly wider than the candle itself, and has a natural wood grain texture. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for decorative or ambient lighting in urban environments.
description: A lit white cylindrical candle with a visible flame, set on a round wooden base. The candle is smooth and clean, with a natural wood holder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lit candle with a visible flame and the round wooden base.
description_view_1: Rear view of the candle, with the flame not visible and the smooth cylindrical wax surface prominent.
description_view_2: Another front angle with the flame visible and the wooden base clearly supporting the candle.
description_view_3: Back view of the candle, showing the unlit side and the wooden base, with no flame visible.
